title: What interests hobbies do the Children have
display_title: What interests hobbies do the Children have
wikitext:
[]: What interests/hobbies do the Children have?             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Aug 29, 2013 8:48 pm Split here from pic thread 5 -NemZ TMBounty_Hunter wrote: National Panasonic RF-877 COUGAR NO.7 This page says 1973 http://www.radiomuseum.org/r/panasonic_cougar_no7_rf_877.html

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Aug 29, 2013 8:57 pm Well given that Shikinami is playing around with a WonderSwan it seems they never got to the iPods and PSPs and DSs in the Eva universe. Cell phone tech seems to have progressed just fine though...

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Aug 29, 2013 9:05 pm Yeah, you're right, Asuka is seen playing with a Wonderswan , so maybe it's hard to find recent electronic devices in the post-2I, or maybe it will be revealed that it was her mother's console, or maybe she's just into retro-gaming... but even then her console comes from 1999, far from Shinji's antiquated COUGAR NO.7 from the 70's!(at least his SDAT is from the 90, like Asuka's WonderSwan...)

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Aug 29, 2013 9:22 pm Apparently the WonderSwan had an Ultraman game, so given Anno being Anno I think we can assume that's what she's always playing. But yeah, that Cougar thing... wtf, Shinji?

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Thu Aug 29, 2013 9:25 pm It's most likely just a shout out to something. Meaningless.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Aug 29, 2013 9:28 pm Choosing the "cougar" model must mean something SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Deva Victrix » Thu Aug 29, 2013 9:55 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Choosing the "cougar" model must mean something SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Thu Aug 29, 2013 10:07 pm ElMariachi wrote: while Asuka has been given a big liking for videogames, which she completely lacked in NGE .

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Aug 29, 2013 10:20 pm ElMariachi wrote: He's not the only only one whose hobbies has been modified in Rebuild : Rei's hobby of reading books has been accentuated and her hobby of swimming discarded, while Asuka has been given a big liking for videogames, which she completely lacked in NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Aug 30, 2013 5:54 am CJD wrote: Nope. A girl after my own heart  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Katana » Fri Aug 30, 2013 6:09 am CJD wrote: Nope. A girl after my own heart  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Fri Aug 30, 2013 6:17 am ElMariachi wrote: Rei's reading hobby got a much bigger focus in Rebuild than in NGE, especially with Q, while NGE!Rei's liking to swim never got a mention, she's never even seen swimming in Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Fri Aug 30, 2013 6:18 am Lavinius wrote: ^but Asuka can be visibly well and truly angry without losing her beauty SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Aug 30, 2013 6:24 am Bagheera wrote: The fact it's not shoved in our faces with stacks and stacks of books doesn't mean it's not there.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Fri Aug 30, 2013 6:32 am pwhodges wrote: In any case, the stacks of books in Q are to show us Shinji's futile attempt to tease out something of the Rei he remembers and wants to find again.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Aug 30, 2013 8:07 am I know that Rei's reading habits are th same in both continuities, the main difference being that Rebuild!Rei was seen reading fairy tales in English while NGE!Rei read books about genetics, one of them even in German ! What I meant is that in Rei case, her reading habits got a more important focus than in NGE(especially in Q with Shinji bringing to Rei Q lots of books, thinking that she was Rei II), while her hobby of swimming from NGE disappeared.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Fri Aug 30, 2013 8:35 am ElMariachi wrote: What I meant is that in Rei case, her reading habits got a more important focus than in NGE(especially in Q with Shinji bringing to Rei Q lots of books, thinking that she was Rei II), while her hobby of swimming from NGE disappeared.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Aug 30, 2013 9:09 am Bagheera wrote: That's beside the point, though. We see Rei reading rather sophisticated texts -- in English, no less -- at various points throughout NGE. The fact it's not shoved in our faces with stacks and stacks of books doesn't mean it's not there.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Fri Aug 30, 2013 10:13 am ElMariachi wrote: That's what I meant : Soryu was never seen playing videogames except at this moment when she used it as escapism for the trauma caused by Arael, painting her playing videogames in a bad light. And even if there wasn't a console i Misato's apartment, portable consoles still existed, yet she was always seen looking at the TV or reading magazines when she was resting in Misato's place.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Aug 30, 2013 10:24 am CJD wrote: Where's she going to get a portable console?
summary:
[]: What interests/hobbies do the Children have?             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Aug 29, 2013 8:48 pm Split here from pic thread 5 -NemZ TMBounty_Hunter wrote: National Panasonic RF-877 COUGAR NO.7 This page says 1973 http://www.radiomuseum.org/r/panasonic_cougar_no7_rf_877.html

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Aug 29, 2013 8:57 pm Well given that Shikina
